## What changed

## Validation

List the checks and manual tests performed.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No credentials, personal company data, or unsanitized API payloads are included.
- [ ] Raw facts, calculations, and recommendations remain distinguishable.
- [ ] Plugin, protocol, schema, or database compatibility is documented if affected.
- [ ] Security documentation is updated if a trust boundary changed.
